use_cases: Displaying currently playing track information with artwork in music streaming apps
Preview cards for songs or albums in browsable music libraries
Artist profile cards showing featured tracks and play functionality
Podcast episode cards with cover art and episode details
Playlist preview cards for music curation interfaces
ai_summary: A music card component featuring a background image with parallax scaling effect on hover, animated play button that fades in, and smooth spring-based scale transitions. Built with Framer Motion for fluid micro-interactions, this card displays artist name, song title, and optional play callback. Ideal for music streaming interfaces, podcast platforms, or any media-centric application needing engaging track preview cards.
